title: Front Seat Belt Requirement
summary: All front-seat passengers must wear seat belts
details: California requires seat belts for all front-seat occupants while vehicle is moving

title: Front Seat Belt Requirement
summary: Seat belt required for front-seat occupants
details: Texas requires all front-seat passengers to wear seat belts

title: Open Container in Vehicle
summary: No open alcohol container in passenger area
details: New York prohibits open alcohol containers in passenger compartments

title: Open Container in Vehicle
summary: No open alcohol container in vehicle passenger area
details: California prohibits possession of open alcoholic beverage containers in passenger area

title: Texting While Driving Ban
details: Texas law prohibits reading or sending text messages while operating a motor vehicle
